--- title: BaRS Vaccination Appointment Booking Sequence description: Sequence diagram showing the process of booking a vaccination appointment using the BaRS system. author: Matthew Brown date: 2025-08-01 tags: [Retail_CustomerLoyalty] displayMode: sequence config: theme: default look: handdrawn --- sequenceDiagram actor ICB actor P as Patient participant NHSA as NHS App participant BP as BaRS Proxy participant MYA as Manage Your Appt participant NRL as National Record Locator participant NHSN as NHS Notify participant T as Tasking Service (Retail_CouponSystem) note over ICB: ICB has a list of patients
who need to be vaccinated ICB->>+BP: Request vaccine using BaRS ServiceRequest %% see https://simplifier.net/nhsbookingandreferrals/~resources?category=Example&exampletype=Bundle&sortBy=DisplayName for example messages BP->>MYA: Request vaccine using BaRS ServiceRequest MYA-->>BP: Acknowledge request BP-->>-ICB: Acknowledge request MYA->>T: Create Task for Patient to Book Appointment T-->>MYA: Return Task id MYA->>+NHSN: Inform patient of referral and need to book appt NHSN->>-NHSA: Notify patient NHSA->>P: Notify patient P->>P: Reads notification P->>NHSA: Launches NHS App activate NHSA NHSA<<->>T: Reads and shows patient outstanding tasks P->>NHSA: Clicks "Book Vaccine Appt" generated from Task NHSA->>+BP: Uses Task metadata to query Slots for HealthcareService BP->>MYA: Query Slots MYA-->>BP: Return Slots BP-->>-NHSA: Return Slots P->>NHSA: Choose Appointment Slot NHSA->>+BP: Create Appt w/ Slot Details BP->>MYA: Create Appt w/ Slot Details MYA-->>MYA: Check ServiceRequest for patient eligibility MYA--)T: Mark Task as Complete MYA-->>BP: Confirm Appt Booked Note over MYA: Details on how
Appointment is matched
to ServiceRequest to be defined BP-->>-NHSA: Confirm Appt Booked NHSA-->>P: Show Appointment Confirmation opt MYA->>NHSN: Confirm Appointment Booked via message end deactivate NHSA Note over MYA: Inform NRL of Appointment
in background MYA->>+BP: Create Appt Pointer with Datetime and Status BP->>-NRL: Create Appt Pointer with Datetime and Status
repo_description: repository for hosting random TA PoCs

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个BaRS疫苗预约的完整流程图。核心是从ICB发起请求，经过BaRS Proxy，最终让患者通过NHS App完成预约。关键参与者包括ICB、患者、NHS App、BaRS Proxy、Manage Your Appt、National Record Locator、NHS Notify，还有一个Tasking Service我们内部叫Retail Coupon System。
明白了。我注意到Tasking Service的标注是"Retail_CouponSystem"，这是同一个系统的别名吗？另外，流程起点是ICB有一个待接种患者列表，然后发起ServiceRequest？
对的，Tasking Service就是Retail Coupon System的内部代号。流程是这样的：ICB向BaRS Proxy发送ServiceRequest，Proxy转发给Manage Your Appt，MYA确认后创建一个Task给Tasking Service，同时通过NHS Notify通知患者。
好的，我已经画出了前半段：ICB→Proxy→MYA的请求链，MYA创建Task并返回Task id，然后MYA触发NHS Notify→NHS App→患者的通知流程。接下来患者打开App后怎么交互？
患者打开NHS App后，App要从Tasking Service读取待办任务，显示"预约疫苗"的入口。患者点击后，App用Task里的元数据去Proxy查询可预约时段，Proxy再向MYA查Slots，返回给患者选择。
这里有个细节：查询Slots和创建预约都是同步调用吗？还有，MYA在确认预约前需要检查ServiceRequest的患者资格，这个检查是内部处理还是和外部交互？
查询和创建都是同步的，用实线箭头。资格检查是MYA内部做的，画成自循环。确认预约后，MYA要异步标记Task为Complete，然后可选地再发一次确认通知。最后MYA还要在后台把预约信息写入National Record Locator。
完成了。我画了患者选时段、创建预约的完整往返，MYA内部资格检查，Task标记完成，以及最后MYA通过Proxy向NRL写入Appointment Pointer的异步流程。还需要调整什么吗？
等等，NHS App的生命周期需要调整。患者打开App时应该activate，整个预约流程期间保持激活状态，直到最后显示确认信息后才deactivate。另外，MYA内部关于"预约如何匹配到ServiceRequest"的逻辑，我们加个注释说明待定义。
已修复。NHS App的激活期覆盖了从患者打开App、读取任务、查询时段、创建预约到最终确认的全过程。MYA内部也添加了注释说明匹配逻辑待定义。整个流程应该完整了。
